summary: FPV drones destroyed a Russian 9K51M Tornado-G MLRS and two Russian soldiers on motorcycles, while another Russian soldier pretending to surrender was killed by FPV drones after fleeing. Ukrainian forces in the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV attack, with a drone detector alerting them at 0:11 in footage from Kostiantinivka. The Rubicon Center reported 173 targets destroyed on April 8 and 90 on April 9, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel across multiple directions. An "Elka" anti-aircraft drone performed a kinetic interception of a Ukrainian fixed-wing UAV, causing critical airframe damage.
